integrity_validation.method: For every assigned record, resolve path beneath the pinned upstream, read the stated one-based line from the UTF-8 file, and compare SHA-256 of the full line without its line terminator to full_line_sha256.

classification_method.canonical_cluster_rediscovery: GEN-001 matches restate the already merged decision-to-policy or seed-to-style calibration mechanisms (MERGE-001/MERGE-002). GEN-002 matches restate the already merged firm-specific profile, risk, escalation, house-style, or prohibited-position mechanisms (MERGE-001), except for the twelve explicit non-disclosure guardrails listed as counterevidence.
classification_method.counterevidence: A match is counterevidence when its full line expressly says retrieved content must never surface the practice profile or reveal matter/conflicts material. These written controls correspond to MERGE-006; their runtime effectiveness remains unknown.
classification_method.false_positive: No assigned line was unrelated to the generated pattern's bounded subject after full-line review.
classification_method.new_candidate: A candidate would require a material mechanism or source-to-sink class not already represented by MERGE-001 through MERGE-006. None was found.

runtime_boundary: Static prompt and documentation lines establish designed local profiles, calibration, and written non-disclosure controls only. They do not establish deployed behavior, provider custody, retention, training, or cross-customer reuse.

saturation_recommendation.basis: All 694 assigned records passed path/line/hash validation and resolved only to existing canonical clusters or repeated counterevidence; no new material pattern class or source-to-sink candidate remained.
saturation_recommendation.scope: GEN-001 and GEN-002 at the pinned upstream revision only
